## Tags
garbage, delete, remove, bin

## Categories
files, mail

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/trash-2)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Trash2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Trash2 { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
